title: MIDWUT
description: the Most Important Datapack With Useful Tools — Datapack core and library, for some datapacks to work
body:
### Don't forget to download the resourcepack from the [Version Files](https://modrinth.com/datapack/midwut/version/2.2.0)

## 📖 About
**MIDWUT** stands for **M**ost **I**mportant **D**atapack **W**ith **U**seful **T**ools.

The datapack is the core and library.  
The core, because some datapacks completely need it.  
A library, because if desired, you can copy some functions or tags to your datapack, this is allowed, but specify the source.

The main technical instructions for using the help functions are found in the functions themselves.

### Main technical features:
- MIDWUT Crafting Station;
- The datapack has its own empty dimension `midwut:main`. It has:
  - purple shulker box at `0 0 0`
  - warped sign at `1 0 0`
  - marker with `0000051d-0000-0fb7-0000-001500000014` selector at 0.0 0.0 0.0
- A wide variety of function tags for various add-ons;
- The main library functions in the help/ folder;
- Test functions (they may not work);
- A wide variety of block tags;
- Useful predicates;
- Custom blocks support using soul campfire.

### User-frendly features:
- MIDWUT Crafting Station

#
## 🔗 Links
You can leave a comment on the PMC page!

[![PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/images/layout/themes/modern/planetminecraft_logo.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/midwut/)

Russian discord server of datapackers / Русский дискорд сервер датапакеров

Если вы датапакер, ищите адекватной помощи, полезных ресурсов и возможности поделиться проектами, то вам на [СвинСоюз: Датапаки](https://discord.gg/YNsUzsxyu5)!
Это сервер-ответвление от изначального заброшенного сервера ZeroCaty "СвинСоюз". Сейчас мы не имеем к нему никакого отношения.

[![SvinSoyuz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afb7cdcc943fceaa9f901c538ccfe15ea357f383.png)](https://discord.gg/YNsUzsxyu5)
